name: Particles Network
implementation: canvas requestAnimationFrame - dots array with velocity - connect lines under 120px distance

name: Aurora Waves
implementation: CSS keyframes - multiple radial-gradients animating position and opacity

name: Rainbow Beam
implementation: Single div - linear-gradient full spectrum - animate translateY with blur filter

name: Floating Orbs
implementation: Multiple absolute divs - radial-gradient - animate transform with different durations

name: Grid Lines
implementation: CSS perspective on grid div - animate backgroundPosition

name: Morphing Blob
implementation: Three.js SphereGeometry with perlin noise on vertices - animate time uniform

name: Typewriter Text
implementation: JS loop adding chars with setTimeout - blinking cursor with CSS animation

name: Glitch Effect
description: Digital glitch distortion on text or image
implementation: CSS clip-path animation - multiple pseudo-elements offset in X - animate rapidly

name: Scroll Reveal
description: Elements animate in as user scrolls down
implementation: IntersectionObserver API - add visible class triggering CSS transform and opacity

name: Count Up Numbers
description: Stats numbers count up from zero
implementation: JS requestAnimationFrame - increment value over 2s - easeOutQuad timing

name: Gradient Mesh
implementation: CSS conic-gradient or mesh-gradient - animate hue-rotate and scale

name: Noise Grain Overlay
description: Subtle film grain texture over background
implementation: SVG feTurbulence filter - animate seed value - low opacity overlay

name: Spotlight Cursor
implementation: JS mousemove listener - radial-gradient centered on cursor position

name: Floating Cards
description: UI cards floating with parallax depth
implementation: CSS transform translateY with different animation-delay per card - subtle infinite loop

name: Wave Text
description: Letters animate in a flowing wave pattern
implementation: JS loop applying CSS animation-delay per letter - translateY sine wave

name: Starfield Background
description: Tiny dots moving slowly like stars
implementation: Canvas - random dots array - slow velocity - wrap around edges

name: Scanlines Overlay
implementation: CSS repeating-linear-gradient - semi-transparent lines - subtle opacity

name: Liquid Gradient
implementation: CSS radial-gradient blobs - animate border-radius and transform - blur filter
